The problem

You didn't become a trainer to fight admin

📊
Spreadsheet Hell

Client data scattered across sheets, WhatsApp, and outdated folders. Zero structure, maximum chaos.

👻
Zero Accountability

Clients ghost check-ins. You can't track what you can't see. Progress stalls and clients churn.

🔧
The Franken-Stack

Payments in one app, scheduling in another, programs in a notes app. Nothing talks to anything.

How it works

01
Apply

Submit your trainer application. We review and onboard only serious, results-driven coaches. Credentials sent within 24 hours.

02
Onboard

Import your existing clients, customize your check-in forms, and set up your coaching system in one clean workspace.

03
Grow

Focus entirely on training. FitBase handles all admin, tracking, client communication, and compliance - automatically.

Your coaching command center

📋
Client Sign-ups & Onboarding

Manage new applications, send credentials, and activate clients in seconds from the dashboard.

✅
Daily & Weekly Check-Ins

Clients log weight, calories, protein, sleep, and workouts. You see it all in real time.

💬
Integrated Messaging

Message clients directly inside FitBase. No more scattered WhatsApp threads.

📊
Analytics & Progress Tracking

Visualize client progress over time. Spot trends, flag issues, and prove results with data.

What your clients actually see

✓

Daily check-in form - Weight, body fat, calories, protein, sleep, workouts - all in one 2-minute tap.

✓

Sunday progress review - Weekly structured audit so trainer and client review the week together.

✓

Program & workout access - Clients see their assigned programs directly in the portal.

✓

Trainer messaging - Direct line to their trainer without leaving the platform.

Questions answered

How long does approval take after I apply?
+

Most applications are reviewed within 24 hours. Once approved, you'll receive your trainer login credentials directly by email.

What does my client see when they log in?
+

Clients get a clean mobile-first portal with tabs for Home, Workouts, Programs, Check-In, and Messages. The daily check-in takes under 2 minutes.

Can I import my existing clients?
+

Yes. Once onboarded, you can add clients manually or bulk-import them. Your FitBase admin helps set up your initial client list during onboarding.

Is there a mobile app for clients?
+

FitBase is fully mobile-optimized and works on any smartphone browser without a download. A native app is on our roadmap.

What does the AI assistant help trainers with?
+

The AI is exclusively for trainers. It helps draft client feedback, analyze check-in data, suggest program adjustments, and generate weekly summaries.

Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
+

Yes. Upgrades take effect immediately; downgrades apply at the start of your next billing cycle.
